briefdescription.para: Feed a byte into the NMEA streaming parser.

parameterdescription.para: Output buffer for completed NMEA sentence string (if returns true).

simplesect.para: true if a complete, valid NMEA sentence was received.

briefdescription.para: Calculate XOR checksum of an NMEA sentence payload (between '$' and '*').
Validate an NMEA sentence string (checks start '$', '*XX' checksum, and CRLF).

simplesect.para: true if valid sentence and matching checksum.

briefdescription.para: Identify sentence type from NMEA string.
Parse NMEA DDMM.MMMM coordinate string and direction indicator.
NMEA 0183 / GNSS sentence parser and encoder.

detaileddescription.para:
Provides a zero-allocation, streaming byte-at-a-time NMEA 0183 parser, sentence checksum verification, and structured data decoders for standard GNSS sentences:
GGA: Global Positioning System Fix Data
RMC: Recommended Minimum Specific GNSS Data
VTG: Course Over Ground & Ground Speed
GSA: GNSS DOP & Active Satellites
ZDA: UTC Time & Date
